name: SBC Medical Group Holdings Inc
business: SBC Medical Group Holdings Inc provides comprehensive management services to aesthetic clinics in Japan, primarily through franchisor-franchisee contracts with medical corporations (MCs). It also owns and operates clinics in Singapore and Vietnam, and is pursuing U.S. market entry through strategic investments such as a minority stake in OrangeTwist. Revenues are derived from management fees, resale of medical supplies, and licensing of technologies and brands.
sellsTo: independently operated clinics under partner doctor independence support program
directly owned clinics in Singapore and Vietnam
namedCustomers: Public Interest Foundation SBC Medical Promotion Foundation

exposures.sentence: SBC AI is the industry's first double AI simulation service.
a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market and a medical research and development company specializing in regenerative medicine technologies.

catalysts.sentence: On November 20, 2024, the Company completed the payment of SGD 7.8 million in cash for the acquisition of 100% of the voting equity interest in AHH and its subsidiaries.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of MB career lounge Co., Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: On July 17, 2025, the Company acquired MB career lounge, a Japan-based management support services provider.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of controlling interest in Waqoo, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On December 19, 2025, the Company acquired a controlling interest in Waqoo, Inc.

catalysts.event: Strategic minority equity investment in OT Midco (OrangeTwist)
catalysts.sentence: on December 29, 2025, we acquired an approximately 18.2% voting interest in OT Midco Holdings, LLC.

catalysts.event: Consulting agreement with BLEZ ASIA Co., Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we entered into a consulting agreement with BLEZ ASIA Co., Ltd., which operates more than 20 clinics and pharmacies in Thailand, to support our entry into Thailand.

catalysts.event: Appointment of Dr. Steven R. Cohen as Medical Strategy Advisor
catalysts.sentence: In the same month, we appointed Dr. Steven R. Cohen as Medical Strategy Advisor to support our global expansion initiatives and enhance our medical quality and physician training programs.
